title: 2 x Purple Bougainvillea Plant in 15cm Pot – Deciduous Paper Flower Shrub, Outdoor Patio Garden Trellis Vine, Indoor Houseplant, Low Maintenance, Flowering Vine, Balcony Plant, Tropical Ornamental
features: 🌺 Vibrant Colour Display – Bursting with rich purple bracts, this bougainvillea adds stunning colour to patios, gardens, and sunny indoor spots.
🍃 Deciduous Variety – A deciduous plant that naturally drops leaves in cooler months, with fresh new growth returning in spring.
🌞 Sun-Loving Beauty – Thrives in full sun with well-drained soil; great for trellises, fences, or growing in a container on the patio.
🌿 Ideal Size – Supplied in a 15cm pot, this mature plant reaches 50–55cm in height, perfect for compact outdoor or indoor spaces.
🎁Easy to Care For – Drought-tolerant when established; simply water when the soil is dry and enjoy a low-maintenance flowering display.
🏡 Indoor & Outdoor Use – Adds exotic flair to bright indoor rooms or sunny garden corners during the warmer seasons.
description: Vibrant Purple Bougainvillea in a 15cm pot, perfect for adding color to your garden, patio, or indoor space. This deciduous flowering vine is low maintenance, drought-tolerant, and ideal for trellises, balconies, or bright rooms. Easy to grow and stunning year-round.
